name: io.github.BasicOps/basicops
description: BasicOps MCP server for project management, tasks, notes, and team collaboration.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: BasicOps API key. Required for clients that do not support OAuth 2.1 (e.g. Claude CLI).

api_key.description: Your BasicOps API key. Generate one in BasicOps Settings → API Keys.
